sentences.english: This factory manufactures clothes.
sentences.hindi: यह फैक्ट्री कपड़े बनाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this factory manufactures clothes

sentences.english: The machine runs day and night.
sentences.hindi: मशीन दिन-रात चलती है।
sentences.pronunciation: the machine runs day and night

sentences.english: Workers work hard.
sentences.hindi: मजदूर मेहनत से काम करते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: workers work hard

sentences.english: Production has increased.
sentences.hindi: उत्पादन बढ़ गया है।
sentences.pronunciation: production has increased

sentences.english: The manager gives instructions to the team.
sentences.hindi: मैनेजर टीम को निर्देश देता है।
sentences.pronunciation: the manager gives instructions to the team

sentences.english: This industry is growing rapidly.
sentences.hindi: यह उद्योग तेजी से बढ़ रहा है।
sentences.pronunciation: this industry is growing rapidly

sentences.english: We import raw material from abroad.
sentences.hindi: हम कच्चा माल विदेश से मंगाते हैं।
sentences.pronunciation: we import raw material from abroad

sentences.english: India exports clothes to other countries.
sentences.hindi: भारत कपड़े दूसरे देशों को निर्यात करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: india exports clothes to other countries

sentences.english: The manufacturing process is complex.
sentences.hindi: निर्माण प्रक्रिया जटिल है।
sentences.pronunciation: the manufacturing process is complex

sentences.english: Quality control is necessary.
sentences.hindi: गुणवत्ता नियंत्रण जरूरी है।
sentences.pronunciation: quality control is necessary

sentences.english: There was a delay in the supply chain.
sentences.hindi: आपूर्ति श्रृंखला में देरी हुई।
sentences.pronunciation: there was a delay in the supply chain

sentences.english: The company is setting up a new plant.
sentences.hindi: कंपनी नए संयंत्र लगा रही है।
sentences.pronunciation: the company is setting up a new plant

sentences.english: Workers need safety equipment.
sentences.hindi: श्रमिकों को सुरक्षा उपकरण चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: workers need safety equipment

sentences.english: This industry creates employment.
sentences.hindi: यह उद्योग रोजगार पैदा करता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this industry creates employment

sentences.english: The demand for the product has increased.
sentences.hindi: उत्पाद की मांग बढ़ी है।
sentences.pronunciation: the demand for the product has increased

sentences.english: New technology was installed in the factory.
sentences.hindi: फैक्ट्री में नई तकनीक लगाई गई।
sentences.pronunciation: new technology was installed in the factory

sentences.english: This company produces on a large scale.
sentences.hindi: यह कंपनी बड़े पैमाने पर उत्पादन करती है।
sentences.pronunciation: this company produces on a large scale

sentences.english: Maintenance of machines is necessary.
sentences.hindi: मशीनों का रखरखाव जरूरी है।
sentences.pronunciation: maintenance of machines is necessary

sentences.english: The industry received help from the government.
sentences.hindi: उद्योग को सरकार से सहायता मिली।
sentences.pronunciation: the industry received help from the government

sentences.english: This product sells in the international market.
sentences.hindi: यह उत्पाद अंतरराष्ट्रीय बाजार में बिकता है।
sentences.pronunciation: this product sells in the international market
